heading: Transactions between partner and partnership
label: 707 Transactions between partner and partnership

Effective Date of 1984 Amendment, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 98–369, div. A, title I, § 73(b)98 Stat. 592Pub. L. 99–514, § 2100 Stat. 2095July 18, 1984Oct. 22, 1986“(1).—In generalThe amendment made by subsection (a) [amending this section] shall apply—“(A)in the case of arrangements described in section 707(a)(2)(A) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 [formerly I.R.C. 1954] (as amended by subsection (a)), to services performed or property transferred after , andFebruary 29, 1984“(B)in the case of transfers described in section 707(a)(2)(B) of such Code (as so amended), to property transferred after .March 31, 1984“(2).—Binding contract exceptionThe amendment made by subsection (a) shall not apply to a transfer of property described in section 707(a)(2)(B)(i) if such transfer is pursuant to a binding contract in effect on , and at all times thereafter before the transfer.March 31, 1984“(3).—Exception for certain transfersThe amendment made by subsection (a) shall not apply to a transfer of property described in section 707(a)(2)(B)(i) that is made before , if—December 31, 1984“(A)such transfer was proposed in a written private offering memorandum circulated before ;February 28, 1984“(B)the out-of-pocket costs incurred with respect to such offering exceeded $250,000 as of ;February 28, 1984“(C)the encumbrances placed on such property in anticipation of such transfer all constitute obligations for which neither the partnership nor any partner is liable; and“(D)the transferor of such property is the sole general partner of the partnership.”

Effective Date of 1976 AmendmentAmendment by applicable in the case of partnership taxable years beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .section 213(b)(3) of Pub. L. 94–455section 2 of this titleDec. 31, 1976

Rule of Construction, , , provided that:Pub. L. 119–21, title VII, § 70602(c)139 Stat. 284July 4, 2025“Nothing in this section [amending this section and enacting provisions set out as a note above], or the amendments made by this section, shall be construed to create any inference with respect to the proper treatment under section 707(a) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 with respect to payments from a partnership to a partner for services performed, or property transferred, on or before the date of the enactment of this Act [].”July 4, 2025

children.heading: Partner not acting in capacity as partner
children.label: a Partner not acting in capacity as partner

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If a partner engages in a transaction with a partnership other than in his capacity as a member of such partnership, the transaction shall, except as otherwise provided in this section, be considered as occurring between the partnership and one who is not a partner.

children.heading: Treatment of payments to partners for property or services
children.label: 2 Treatment of payments to partners for property or services

children.heading: Treatment of certain services and transfers of property
children.label: A Treatment of certain services and transfers of property
i
children.text: a partner performs services for a partnership or transfers property to a partnership,

children.label: ii
children.text: there is a related direct or indirect allocation and distribution to such partner, and

children.label: iii
children.text: the performance of such services (or such transfer) and the allocation and distribution, when viewed together, are properly characterized as a transaction occurring between the partnership and a partner acting other than in his capacity as a member of the partnership,

children.heading: Treatment of certain property transfers
children.label: B Treatment of certain property transfers
i
children.text: there is a direct or indirect transfer of money or other property by a partner to a partnership,

children.label: ii
children.text: there is a related direct or indirect transfer of money or other property by the partnership to such partner (or another partner), and

children.label: iii
children.text: the transfers described in clauses (i) and (ii), when viewed together, are properly characterized as a sale or exchange of property,

children.heading: Certain sales or exchanges of property with respect to controlled partnerships
children.label: b Certain sales or exchanges of property with respect to controlled partnerships
A
children.text: a partnership and a person owning, directly or indirectly, more than 50 percent of the capital interest, or the profits interest, in such partnership, or

children.label: B
children.text: two partnerships in which the same persons own, directly or indirectly, more than 50 percent of the capital interests or profits interests.

children.label: A
children.text: between a partnership and a person owning, directly or indirectly, more than 50 percent of the capital interest, or profits interest, in such partnership, or

children.label: B
children.text: between two partnerships in which the same persons own, directly or indirectly, more than 50 percent of the capital interests or profits interests,

children.heading: Ownership of a capital or profits interest
children.label: 3 Ownership of a capital or profits interest
children.text: For purposes of paragraphs (1) and (2) of this subsection, the ownership of a capital or profits interest in a partnership shall be determined in accordance with the rules for constructive ownership of stock provided in section 267(c) other than paragraph (3) of such section.

children.heading: Guaranteed payments
children.label: c Guaranteed payments
children.text: To the extent determined without regard to the income of the partnership, payments to a partner for services or the use of capital shall be considered as made to one who is not a member of the partnership, but only for the purposes of section 61(a) (relating to gross income) and, subject to section 263, for purposes of section 162(a) (relating to trade or business expenses).
